mapper.select: SELECT username, name, email FROM "h_member" WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND role = 'trainer' ORDER BY name

SELECT r.username AS "username", mem.name AS "memberName", mgr.username AS "memberId", mgr.name AS "mangerName", r.churn_rate AS "churnRate" FROM "h_churn_result" r JOIN "h_member" mem ON r.username = mem.username JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT cd.manager_id FROM "h_content_data" cd WHERE cd.receiver_id = r.username AND cd.manager_id IS NOT NULL AND cd.gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY cd.signed_at DESC NULLS LAST, cd.data_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest ON true JOIN "h_member" mgr ON mgr.username = latest.manager_id WHERE mem.gym_id = #{gymId} AND r.churn_rate >= 0.45 AND #{statKey} IN (r.top1_reason, r.top2_reason, r.top3_reason)
AND r.churn_date IS NOT NULL AND to_char(r.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{period}
AND r.churn_date = cast(#{period} as date)
ORDER BY r.churn_rate DESC

SELECT center_id AS "centerId", center_name AS "centerName", brand_name AS "brandName", center_phone AS "centerPhone", operationg_hours AS "operationHours", onsite_repair_status AS "onsiteRepair", service_center_url AS "url" FROM "h_service_center" ORDER BY center_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_helper" (username, title, contents, date, status) VALUES (#{username}, '헬퍼 요청', #{contents}, CURRENT_DATE, '처리대기')
